sentences.target: Le passage est bloqué ce matin.

translations.fr: Le passage est bloqué ce matin.
translations.en: The passage is blocked this morning.
translations.es: El paso está cortado esta mañana.
translations.de: Der Durchgang ist heute Morgen gesperrt.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天早上通道被堵住了。
translations.pt: A passagem está bloqueada esta manhã.
translations.vi: Lối đi bị chặn sáng nay.
translations.hu: Az átjáró ma reggel le van zárva.
translations.el: Το πέρασμα είναι κλειστό σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Passasjen er stengt i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Passagen är avstängd nu på morgonen.
translations.ro: Trecerea este blocată în această dimineață.
translations.da: Passagen er spærret her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝は通路が塞がっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'passage' (subject).
Masculine singular noun functioning as the subject; denotes a way/corridor.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links subject to the predicate 'bloqué'.
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally), masculine singular; predicate complement describing the subject's state.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; specifies the time noun 'matin'.
Masculine singular noun used as a temporal complement ('this morning').

translations.es: Cruzamos por el paso de peatones.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在人行横道上过马路。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sang đường ở vạch dành cho người đi bộ.
translations.nl: We steken over bij het zebrapad.
translations.hi: हम ज़ेब्रा क्रॉसिंग पर सड़क पार करते हैं.
translations.id: Kami menyeberang di penyeberangan pejalan kaki.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; here generic subject ('one/we').
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; denotes the action of crossing.
Preposition contracted with the definite article ('à' + 'le'); introduces the prepositional phrase indicating location.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'au', referring to a crossing.
Adjective modifying 'passage' (masculine singular); forms the compound 'passage piéton' = pedestrian crossing.

sentences.target: Je souligne ce passage dans le livre.
sentences.reading: /ʒə suliɲ sə pasaʒ dɑ̃ lə livʁ/

translations.fr: Je souligne ce passage dans le livre.
translations.ipa: /ʒə suliɲ sə pasaʒ dɑ̃ lə livʁ/
translations.en: I underline this passage in the book.
translations.es: Subrayo este pasaje en el libro.
translations.de: Ich unterstreiche diese Textstelle im Buch.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在书里把这段话划线。
translations.yue: 我喺書入面為呢段文字劃底線。
translations.ru: Я подчеркиваю этот отрывок в книге.
translations.he: אני מסמן קו מתחת לקטע הזה בספר.
translations.vi: Tôi gạch dưới đoạn này trong sách.
translations.ar: أضع خطًا تحت هذا المقطع في الكتاب.
translations.nl: Ik onderstreep deze passage in het boek.
translations.uk: Я підкреслюю цей уривок у книжці.
translations.hu: Aláhúzom ezt a részletet a könyvben.
translations.hi: मैं किताब में इस अंश को रेखांकित करता हूँ.
translations.el: Υπογραμμίζω αυτό το απόσπασμα στο βιβλίο.
translations.nb: Jeg understreker dette avsnittet i boken.
translations.id: Saya menggarisbawahi bagian ini dalam buku.
translations.sv: Jag stryker under det här stycket i boken.
translations.da: Jeg understreger dette afsnit i bogen.
translations.ja: 本のこの箇所に下線を引きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Transitive verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main predicate.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'passage'.
Masculine singular noun; direct object of 'souligne'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('dans le livre').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'livre'.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Il y a un passage derrière le café.
sentences.reading: /il j‿a œ̃ pasaʒ dɛʁjɛʁ lə kafe/

translations.fr: Il y a un passage derrière le café.
translations.ipa: /il j‿a œ̃ pasaʒ dɛʁjɛʁ lə kafe/
translations.en: There is a passage behind the café.
translations.es: Hay un pasaje detrás de la cafetería.
translations.de: Hinter dem Café gibt es einen Durchgang.
translations.it: C'è un passaggio dietro al bar.
translations.zh-Hans: 咖啡馆后面有一条通道。
translations.pt: Há uma passagem atrás do café.
translations.vi: Có một lối đi phía sau quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Er is een doorgang achter het café.
translations.hu: A kávézó mögött van egy átjáró.
translations.hi: कैफ़े के पीछे एक रास्ता है.
translations.el: Υπάρχει ένα πέρασμα πίσω από την καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Det er en passasje bak kafeen.
translations.id: Ada sebuah lorong di belakang kafe.
translations.sv: Det finns en passage bakom kaféet.
translations.ro: Există un pasaj în spatele cafenelei.
translations.da: Der er en passage bag caféen.
translations.ja: カフェの裏に通路があります。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'; no specific referent.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a'.
Verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; with 'il y' forms the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'passage'.
Masculine singular noun; nominal complement in the existential construction ('there is a passage').
Preposition introducing a spatial PP ('derrière le café').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'café'.
Masculine singular noun; object of the preposition 'derrière'.
